background: Three examples of the combination formula ${ }_n C_x=\frac{n!}{x!(n-x)!}$ are presented.

task.query: How many ways can you choose two items out of three?
task.answer: ${ }_3 C_2=\frac{3!}{2!(3-2)!}=\frac{3 \cdot 2 \cdot 1}{2 \cdot 1(1)}=\frac{6}{2}=3$. This means that you can choose two items out of three three different ways-label items $A, B$, and $C$. You can choose \{A, B\}, \{A, C\}, or \{B, C\}.

task.query: How many ways can we choose two items out of four?
How many ways can we choose five items out of seven?
